ash_hound.name: the Ash Hound
ash_hound.flavor: A hound that survived the famine winter by eating its kennel-mates. It remembers you.

bonesong_acolyte.name: the Bonesong Acolyte
bonesong_acolyte.flavor: A novice of the unanswered Choir. He still hums the wrath-hymn under his breath.

pall_touched_cleric.name: the Pall-Touched Cleric
pall_touched_cleric.flavor: She mends because she cannot remember not mending. The Pall left her this much.
